examples: Try to come up with a principled, compelling counterargument.
Will you reject the counterargument and explain why it is mistaken?
This paper is presented as a counterargument against the views of Professor Zhang Jinghao on translatology.
The counterargument goes like this: A President McCain or Obama will have to abandon his campaign promises anyway.
My counterargument is that you don't go directly and immediately from reserve and money creation to rampant inflation.
